description: Human CHANGES_REQUESTED review (authorType User) with no inline threads and an in-progress CI check. Routes to fix_code (not escalate). Human CR reviews are surfaced but not auto-dismissed — the reviewer must re-review or dismiss themselves. In-progress runs are listed because changesRequestedReviews is code-shaped work.

changesRequestedReviews.author: architect
changesRequestedReviews.body: The overall design needs to be reconsidered. Please see my comments in the review summary above.
